description: Ptrc is the 30-bp core of the trc promoter, a synthetic trp/lac hybrid with perfect-consensus -35 and -10 boxes separated by a consensus-optimal 17-bp spacer.

references.authors: Amann E, Ochs B, Abel KJ
references.title: Tightly regulated tac promoter vectors useful for the expression of unfused and fused proteins in Escherichia coli

references.authors: de Boer HA, Comstock LJ, Vasser M
references.title: The tac promoter: a functional hybrid derived from the trp and lac promoters
references.journal: Proc Natl Acad Sci U S A. 1983 Jan;80(1):21-25

references.title: 'ATG vectors' for regulated high-level expression of cloned genes in Escherichia coli

references.authors: Brosius J, Erfle M, Storella J
references.title: Spacing of the -10 and -35 regions in the tac promoter. Effect on its in vivo activity

label: Ptrc
note: Ptrc is the 30-bp core of the trc promoter, a synthetic trp/lac hybrid with perfect-consensus -35 and -10 boxes separated by a consensus-optimal 17-bp spacer.
Perfect-consensus -35 hexamer (TTGACA) opening the trc promoter core, derived from the trp promoter in the tac/trc hybrid.
Perfect-consensus Pribnow (-10) box (TATAAT), derived from the lac UV5 promoter in the trc/tac hybrid, located 17 bp downstream of the -35 box.

functional_claims.label: Strong sigma70 promoter core (trc); this part is the core only (no lac operator).

value.note: promoter core only; add a lac operator for IPTG control

source.quote: Ptrc is the 30-bp core of the trc promoter, a synthetic trp/lac hybrid with perfect-consensus -35 and -10 boxes separated by a consensus-optimal 17-bp spacer.
